gapResults.feature: GraphQL xAPI — productConfiguration query and addItem with configuration
gapResults.notes: Covers Product/Text/File section types for productConfiguration query, addItem mutation with configurationSections, updateConfigurationItem for Product/Text sections, and error handling for invalid configurationId and missing required sections.

gapResults.feature: Admin UI — Configuration section CRUD for Product/Text/File types
gapResults.notes: Covers create Product/Text/File sections, edit section properties, delete section with storefront verification, and section ordering. Uses blade/grid/save step tags per admin layer spec.
CFG-PROMO-003 directly tests BL-PRICE-001 discount stacking invariant with Rear wheel sale price + coupon. CFG-PROMO-004 validates multi-item cart with coupon across configured products.

gapResults.feature: Responsive/Mobile — configuration widget on small viewports
gapResults.notes: Tests 375px viewport for widget rendering, accordion touch interaction, and full add-to-cart flow on mobile. Checks 44px touch targets and 16px minimum font size.
Covers Tab navigation, Enter/Space selection, ARIA accordion attributes (aria-expanded, aria-controls), and aria-live region for price change announcements.
Single cross-browser test on Edge via playwright-edge. Verifies widget rendering, price calculations, and add-to-cart interaction parity with Chrome.

gapResults.feature: B2B context — configurable products in org context
gapResults.notes: Tests org-context add-to-cart, B2B checkout with PO number, and org-specific pricing on configuration options. CFG-B2B-003 compares org vs personal pricing.

gapResults.feature: Text section with predefined dictionary values
gapResults.notes: Covers predefined dictionary values (select from list) and mixed freetext + predefined text sections on the same product.

gapResults.feature: Edit configuration in cart — Product/Text/File sections
gapResults.notes: Dedicated storefront-level tests for editing Product section selection, changing text input, and replacing uploaded file via cart 'Edit configuration' button.
